title: Secure remote computer system
abstract: The present invention concerns a system and method for secure cloud computing. The cloud based processing system comprises a user interface, allowing a user to enter and edit data, a proxy server, and a cloud based processing server, The user interface sends data entered by a user to the proxy server, which sends the encrypted data to the cloud based processing server. The proxy server receives editing commands from the user interface, and sends those commands to the cloud based processing server along with the encrypted data. The cloud based processing server receives the encrypted data and editing commands, applies the editing commands to the encrypted data, and sends the edited encrypted data back to the proxy server.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A cloud based processing system comprising: a user interface, configured to allow a user to enter and edit data, a proxy server, and a cloud based processing server, wherein the user interface is configured to send data entered by a user to the proxy server, and the proxy server is configured to receive and encrypt the data, and send the encrypted data to the cloud based processing server, the proxy server further arranged to receive editing commands from the user interface, and send those editing commands to the cloud based processing server along with the encrypted data, the cloud based processing server being arranged to receive the encrypted data and editing commands from the proxy server, and apply the editing commands to the encrypted data, and send the edited encrypted data back to the proxy server. 2. A cloud based processing system as claimed in claim 1, wherein the proxy server is configured to decrypt the edited encrypted data received from the cloud based processing server. 3. A cloud based processing system as claimed 1 or 2, wherein the user interface comprises a display screen and a user input device, the display screen of the user interface configured to show a browser window, presenting an application interface to a user. 4. A cloud based processing system as claimed in claim 3, wherein the application interface corresponds to an application hosted on the cloud based processing server. 5. A cloud based processing system as claimed in claim 4, wherein the application provided by the cloud based processing server is word processor application. 6. A cloud based processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, arranged such that the editing commands entered by a user act to prompt the proxy server to package the user entered data, encrypt the data, and send the encrypted data along with the editing command, to the cloud based processing server. 7. A cloud based processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the cloud based processing server is configured to receive the encrypted data, apply the editing command to the encrypted data, and send the edited encrypted data back to the proxy server. 8. A cloud based processing system as claimed in claim 7, wherein the proxy server is configured to decrypt the edited encrypted data, and send the edited decrypted data to the user interface. 9. A cloud based processing system as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the proxy server and user interface are part of the same computing device. 10. A cloud based processing system as claimed in any of claims 1 to 8, wherein the proxy server and user 

interface are part of a network of devices, the network of devices being protected by a firewall. 11. A cloud based processing system as claimed any preceding claim, wherein the encrypted data comprises one or more tags which identify the type of encrypted data to the cloud based processing server. 12. A method of secure cloud based processing, comprising the steps of: providing plain text data to a proxy server; providing an editing command to the proxy server; the proxy server encrypting the plain text data into a package of encrypted data, the proxy server sending the package of encrypted data and editing command to a cloud based processor, the cloud based processor applying the editing command to the package of encrypted data to create an edited package of encrypted data, the cloud based processor sending the edited package of encrypted data back to the proxy server, the proxy server decrypting the edited package of encrypted data, thereby providing edited plain text data. 13. A method as claimed in claim 12, further comprising the step of the plain text data being provided to the proxy server via a user interface. 14. A method as claimed in claim 12 or claim 13, wherein the cloud based processor comprises a word processing application . 15. A method as claimed in claim 14, further comprising the step of the user interface displaying a browser window which shows a word processor interface. 16. A method as claimed in any of claims 12 to 15, further comprising the step of the proxy server encrypt some of the plain text data in such a way that the cloud based processor may decrypt a limited amount of the plain text data. 17. A method as claimed in any of claims 12 to 16, wherein the step of encryption of the plain text data into a package of encrypted data may comprises the use of Cypher-text Policy Attribute Based Encryption. 18. A method as claimed in any of claims 12 to 17, further comprising the step of encrypting a first package of data with a first encryption key, and a second package of data with a second, different, encryption key. 19. A method as claimed in any of claims 12 to 18, further comprising the step of the proxy server choosing a default encryption key. 20. A method as claimed in any of claims 12 to 19, further comprising the step of a user selecting between the choice of a default encryption key or an alternative encryption key.
